original_query: select min(i_item_sk)       ,min(w_warehouse_name)       ,min(d1.d_week_seq)       ,min(cs_item_sk)       ,min(cs_order_number)       ,min(inv_item_sk) from catalog_sales join inventory on (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk) join warehouse on (w_warehouse_sk=inv_warehouse_sk) join item on (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk) join customer_demographics on (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk) join household_demographics on (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk) join date_dim d1 on (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk) join date_dim d2 on (inv_date_sk = d2.d_date_sk) join date_dim d3 on (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk) left outer join promotion on (cs_promo_sk=p_promo_sk) left outer join catalog_returns on (cr_item_sk = cs_item_sk and cr_order_number = cs_order_number) where d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq   and inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity   and d3.d_date > d1.d_date + interval '3 day'   and hd_buy_potential = '1001-5000'   and d1.d_year = 2001   and cd_marital_status = 'U'   and cd_dep_count between 5 and 7   and i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')   and cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100  ;
rewritten_query:
WITH date_2001 AS (
    SELECT d_date_sk, d_date, d_week_seq
    FROM date_dim
    WHERE d_year = 2001
)
SELECT 
    MIN(i_item_sk),
    MIN(w_warehouse_name),
    MIN(d1.d_week_seq),
    MIN(cs_item_sk),
    MIN(cs_order_number),
    MIN(inv_item_sk)
FROM 
    item
JOIN catalog_sales ON (i_item_sk = cs_item_sk)
JOIN customer_demographics ON (cs_bill_cdemo_sk = cd_demo_sk AND cd_marital_status = 'U' AND cd_dep_count BETWEEN 5 AND 7)
JOIN household_demographics ON (cs_bill_hdemo_sk = hd_demo_sk AND hd_buy_potential = '1001-5000')
JOIN date_2001 d1 ON (cs_sold_date_sk = d1.d_date_sk)
JOIN inventory ON (cs_item_sk = inv_item_sk AND inv_quantity_on_hand < cs_quantity)
JOIN warehouse ON (w_warehouse_sk = inv_warehouse_sk)
JOIN date_dim d2 ON (d1.d_week_seq = d2.d_week_seq)
JOIN date_dim d3 ON (cs_ship_date_sk = d3.d_date_sk AND d3.d_date > d1.d_date + INTERVAL '3 days')
WHERE 
    i_category IN ('Books', 'Home', 'Sports')
    AND cs_wholesale_cost BETWEEN 80 AND 100;

rewrite_suggestion.nave_suggestion: Remove unnecessary LEFT OUTER JOINs to promotion and catalog_returns tables as they don't contribute to the result set. Since these are left joins and none of their columns are used in the SELECT clause or WHERE conditions, removing them simplifies the query without changing the results.
